decisions_made.rationale: User clarified: rule-based fails for 50% posts. Need classifier FIRST.
decisions_made.impact: Stage 0 locates HTML, Stage 1 classifies, then extraction

decisions_made.decision: Stage 0: HTML Locate BEFORE all else
decisions_made.rationale: Sidebar/nav/footer are static noise. Downstream efficiency depends on clean input.
Affiliate/promo/comparison posts need DIFFERENT handling. LLM mandatory.
decisions_made.impact: Affiliate posts skip extraction, promo posts skip extraction, comparison extracts offer price only

decisions_made.rationale: Many similar posts from same vendor. Prevent redundant scraping.
decisions_made.impact: Embedding stored, threshold 0.95 for duplicate, 0.85 for similar

decisions_made.decision: Use local Ollama for iterative testing
decisions_made.rationale: gemma2:27b for accuracy, gemma2:9b for speed, exone3.5:latest for Korean
decisions_made.impact: Next agent should use Ollama for testing, not API

decisions_made.decision: LLM handles bloated marketing + implicit names
decisions_made.rationale: Rule-based Cheerio CANNOT: '최저가 보장! 정식 사업자!' → 'YouTube Premium'
decisions_made.impact: Stage 3 must receive title + body, resolve implicit names

decisions_made.rationale: uv pip install trafilatura. SharePlan: 82K → 1.2K (98.5%). Prices preserved.
decisions_made.impact: Stage 0 uses Trafilatura, NOT Cheerio. Platform chrome removed automatically.

decisions_made.rationale: jq 1.6 for JSON filtering, Zod 4.3.6 for validation
decisions_made.impact: Stage 2 uses jq, Stage 3/4 uses Zod
Stage 3 uses Ollama raw output + Zod validate

decisions_made.decision: Use uv for Python package management
decisions_made.impact: uv pip install works, pip does not

test_results.pain_points_documented: 7 issues with evidence from last run

validation_posts.551b849c00f1: HTML wins - classifier should mark direct_offer

critical_insights: Rule-based parsing FAILS for 50% of posts
Bloated marketing titles require LLM intent classification
Affiliate posts (GamsGo) have NO product info to extract
Comparison posts have TWO prices - must identify offer vs reference
Sidebar/nav/footer are static noise - remove BEFORE classifier
Dedup prevents redundant scraping of similar vendor posts
